Medicare Home Health Visits for months with 'Full' Dual Status XXX
 QMB_MEDICARE_VST_CNT Medicare Home Health Visits for months with 'QMB' Dual Status XXX
 PD_MEDICARE_VST_CNT Medicare Home Health Visits for months with 'Partial' Dual Status XXX

*Because days apply to the stay, and are not parceled out based on when the particular days occurred, the count of days may be greater than the number of
